versions.version_description: This is the first chord tab I've seen I believe

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Hi, I heard this on the radio and it got
stuck in my head so here it is, lol!
Play along with the song to get the
timing down- It's really easy.


https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7PCkvCPvDXk


STANDARD TUNING w/
CAPO ON 2

(*= one strum)


[Chorus]

Because you know
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]*/mute
'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]*/mute
'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]*/mute
'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]*
'Bout that bass...[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, it's pretty clear, I ain't no size two[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
But I can shake it, shake it[/tab]
Like I'm supposed to do
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Cause I got that boom boom that all the boys chase[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]*
And all the right junk in all the right places[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I see the magazine, workin' that Photoshop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
We know that sh*t ain't real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]*/mute
C'mon now, make it stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
If you got beauty beauty, just raise 'em up[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]*
Cause every inch of you is perfect[/tab]
From the bottom to the top


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, my mama she told me don't worry about your size[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
She says boys like a little more booty to hold at night[/tab]
[tab]                                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
You know I won't be no stick figure silicone Barbie doll[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                                               [ch]G[/ch]      -stop
So if that's what you're into then go ahead and move alo---ong[/tab]


[Chorus]

Because you know
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]*/mute
'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]*/mute
'Bout that bass, no treble[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm all about that bass[/tab]
'Bout that bass.. Ha!

[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]*        [ch]G[/ch]
I'm bringing booty back[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
Go ahead and tell them skinny b*tches that[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]D[/ch]
No I'm just playing I know you think you're fat[/tab]
But I'm here to tell ya
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]*
Every inch of you is perfect[/tab]
From the bottom to the top


[Verse 2]

[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, my mama she told me don't worry about your size[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
She says boys like a little more booty to hold at night[/tab]

So if that's what you're into then go ahead and move alo---ong[/tab]


[Chorus]

Because you know

'Bout that bass, 'bout that bass, 'bout that bass, hey, hey

Have fun!
Christy
